SEARCH
Package controller

Class LoginController

java.lang.Object
controller.LoginController
public class LoginController extends Object
Controller class managing the interactions between the View and the Model (DAO layer) for the cruise booking application. Consolidates CRUD logic for cruises, administrators, clients, workers, and bookings.
Author:
Santiago, Iker, Etna, Aritz

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    checkAdminExists(String name)
    Checks if an administrator exists by calling the checkAdminExists method of the AdministratorDAO implementation with the provided name and returns the result.
    boolean
    checkClientInBook(String id)
    Checks if a client is associated with any booking by calling the checkClientInBook method of the ClientDAO implementation with the provided id and returns the result.
    boolean
    checkCruiseInBook(String id)
    Checks if a cruise is associated with any booking by calling the checkCruiseInBook method of the CruiseDAO implementation with the provided id and returns the result.
    boolean
    checkCruiseInWorker(String id)
    Checks if a cruise is associated with any worker by calling the checkCruiseInWorker method of the CruiseDAO implementation with the provided id and returns the result.
    boolean
    checkUser(Administrator user)
    Checks if an administrator's credentials are valid.
    String
    createBooking(Book b)
    Creates a new booking entry.
    boolean
    deleteAdministrator(String name)
    Deletes an administrator by calling the deleteAdministrator method of the AdministratorDAO implementation with the provided name and returns the result.
    boolean
    deleteBooking(String idClient, int codCruise, Date startDate)
    Deletes a booking given its client ID, cruise code, and start date.
    boolean
    deleteClient(Client client)
    Deletes a client by calling the deleteClient method of the ClientDAO implementation with the provided client object and returns the result.
    boolean
    deleteCruise(String id)
    Deletes a cruise by calling the deleteCruise method of the CruiseDAO implementation with the provided id and returns the result.
    boolean
    deleteWorker(String id)
    Deletes a worker from the database using their ID.
    boolean
    emailWorkerExists(String email)
     
    List<Administrator>
    getAllAdministrators()
    Retrieves a list of all administrators by calling the getAllAdministrators method of the AdministratorDAO implementation and returns it.
    List<Book>
    getAllBookings()
    Retrieves all bookings existing in the database.
    List<Client>
    getAllClient()
    Retrieves a list of all clients by calling the getAllClient method of the ClientDAO implementation and returns it.

    getAllCruise()
    Retrieves a list of all cruises by calling the getAllCruise method of the CruiseDAO implementation and returns it.
    List<Worker>
    getAllWorker()
    Retrieves a list of all workers by calling the getAllWorker method of the WorkerDAO implementation and returns it.

    getClientByCode(Client client)
    Retrieves a client by calling the getClientByCode method of the ClientDAO implementation with the provided client object and returns it.

    Retrieves a cruise by calling the getCruiseByCode method of the CruiseDAO implementation with the provided id and returns it.

    Gets the name of the administrator currently logged into the system.

    insertAdministrator(Administrator admin)
    Inserts a new administrator by calling the insertUser method of the AdministratorDAO implementation with the provided administrator object and returns the result.

    Inserts a new client by calling the insertClient method of the ClientDAO implementation with the provided client object and returns the result.
    boolean

    Inserts a new cruise by calling the insertCruise method of the CruiseDAO implementation with the provided cruise object and returns the result.

    insertWorker(Worker worker)
    Inserts a newly created worker into the system.
    boolean
    phoneWorkerExists(String phone)
     
    void
    setLoggedInAdminName(String loggedInAdminName)
    Sets the name of the logged-in administrator by assigning the provided name to the loggedInAdminName variable.
    boolean
    updateAdministrator(Administrator admin)
    Updates an administrator by calling the updateAdministrator method of the AdministratorDAO implementation with the provided administrator object and returns the result.

    updateBooking(Book oldB, Book newB)
    Replaces an existing booking with a new updated booking.
    boolean
    updateClientByCode(Client client)
    Updates a client by calling the updateClientByCode method of the ClientDAO implementation with the provided client object and returns the result.
    boolean
    updateCruiseByCode(Cruise cruise)
    Updates a cruise by calling the updateCruiseByCode method of the CruiseDAO implementation with the provided cruise object and returns the result.
    boolean
    updatePassword(String adminName, String newPassword)
    Updates the password of an administrator by calling the updatePassword method of the AdministratorDAO implementation with the provided administrator name and new password and returns the result.
    boolean
    updateWorker(Worker worker)
    Updates the details of an existing worker.
    void
    viewWindow()
    Creates a new instance of the StartWindow class, passing the current instance of LoginController as a parameter, and sets the window to be visible.

      public List<Worker> getAllWorker()
      Retrieves a list of all workers by calling the getAllWorker method of the WorkerDAO implementation and returns it.
      Returns:

    • checkUser

      public boolean checkUser(Administrator user)
      Checks if an administrator's credentials are valid.
      Parameters:
      user - The administrator object containing name and password.
      Returns:
      true if credentials are valid, false otherwise.

    • deleteWorker

      public boolean deleteWorker(String id)
      Deletes a worker from the database using their ID.
      Parameters:
      id - The ID of the worker to delete.
      Returns:
      true if successfully deleted, false otherwise.

    • updateWorker

      public boolean updateWorker(Worker worker)
      Updates the details of an existing worker.
      Parameters:
      worker - The worker object holding the updated data.
      Returns:
      true if updated successfully, false otherwise.

    • insertWorker

      public boolean insertWorker(Worker worker)
      Inserts a newly created worker into the system.
      Parameters:
      worker - The worker to be inserted.
      Returns:
      true if successfully inserted, false otherwise.

      Sets the name of the logged-in administrator by assigning the provided name to the loggedInAdminName variable.
      Parameters:
      loggedInAdminName -

    • updatePassword

      public boolean updatePassword(String adminName, String newPassword)
      Updates the password of an administrator by calling the updatePassword method of the AdministratorDAO implementation with the provided administrator name and new password and returns the result.
      Parameters:
      adminName -
      newPassword -
      Returns:

    • getAllBookings

      public List<Book> getAllBookings()
      Retrieves all bookings existing in the database.
      Returns:
      A list of all bookings.

    • createBooking

      public String createBooking(Book b)
      Creates a new booking entry.
      Parameters:
      b - The booking object to insert.
      Returns:
      true if booking creation was successful, false otherwise.

    • deleteBooking

      public boolean deleteBooking(String idClient, int codCruise, Date startDate)
      Deletes a booking given its client ID, cruise code, and start date.
      Parameters:
      idClient - The client's ID.
      codCruise - The code of the cruise.
      startDate - The start date of the cruise booking.
      Returns:
      true if deleted properly, false otherwise.

    • updateBooking

      public String updateBooking(Book oldB, Book newB)
      Replaces an existing booking with a new updated booking.
      Parameters:
      oldB - The former booking.
      newB - The newly updated booking.
      Returns:
      true if successfully updated, false otherwise.

    • viewWindow

      public void viewWindow()
      Creates a new instance of the StartWindow class, passing the current instance of LoginController as a parameter, and sets the window to be visible.
